title: MailerLite vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs ActiveCampaign. Find the best email marketing tool for your needs, pricing, features, and ease of use.
intro: MailerLite and ActiveCampaign are two popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite is ideal for budget-conscious small businesses and freelancers, while ActiveCampaign targets growing companies needing advanced automation and CRM capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your business needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Growing businesses needing advanced automation and CRM

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, automation, landing pages, pop-ups, surveys, e-commerce integrations
comparison_table.tool_b: Advanced automation, CRM, lead scoring, site tracking, SMS, dynamic content

choose_a_if: You're starting out and want a free plan with up to 1,000 subscribers
You need e-commerce integrations and landing page builders
You want an affordable solution with a low entry price point
choose_b_if: You need advanced CRM and lead scoring capabilities integrated with email marketing
You require SMS marketing features in addition to email
You're scaling your business and need sophisticated automation workflows

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. MailerLite excels in simplicity, affordability, and e-commerce features, making it ideal for small businesses. ActiveCampaign offers more advanced automation, CRM, and SMS capabilities, making it better suited for growing companies with complex sales processes.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, with a free tier for up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $9/month. ActiveCampaign has no free option and starts at $15/month. For small businesses, MailerLite's free plan can save substantial costs.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and import. Most email service providers allow you to export your subscriber lists and automation workflows. However, you may need to recreate some complex automations manually, as each platform has different automation builders.
